title: The Dissolution of Muslim Marriages Act, 1939
full_text: The Dissolution of Muslim Marriages Act, 1939 मुस्लिम विवाह विघटन अधिनियम, 1939 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 193908 Act Number: 08 Enactment Date: 1939-03-17 Act Year: 1939 Short Title: The Dissolution of Muslim Marriages Act, 1939 Hindi Title: मुस्लिम विवाह विघटन अधिनियम, 1939 Long Title: An Act to consolidate and clarify the provisions of Muslim law relating to suits for dissolution of marriage by women married under Muslim law and to remove doubts as to the effect of the renunciation of Islam by a married Muslim woman on her marriage tie. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 17-03-1939 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Dissolution of Muslim Marriages Act, 1939 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Grounds for decree for dissolution of marriage Section 3. Notice to be served on heirs of the husband when the husband’s whereabouts are not known. Section 4. Effect of conversion to another faith. Section 5. Rights to dower not to be affected. Section 6. Repealed.
